text: with tasks. debugger debugger This is what allows Claude to actually control your browser – clicking buttons, typing text, and taking screenshots – when you ask it to complete tasks for you. This is what allows Claude to actually control your browser – clicking buttons, typing text, and taking screenshots – when you ask it to complete tasks for you. tabGroups tabGroups This lets Claude organize tabs it opens into a separate group with a different color, so you can easily tell which tabs Claude is using versus your personal browsing. This lets Claude organize tabs it opens into a separate group with a different color, so you can easily tell which tabs Claude is using versus your personal browsing. tabs tabs This lets Claude open, close, and switch between browser tabs when completing tasks for you. This lets Claude open, close, and switch between browser tabs when completing tasks for you. alarms alarms This lets Claude run scheduled tasks at specific times you choose – like checking something on a website at a set time every day. This lets Claude run scheduled tasks at specific times you choose – like checking something on a website at a set time every day. notifications notifications This lets Claude send you a notification on your computer when it finishes a task or needs you to take action. This lets Claude send you a notification on your computer when it finishes a task or needs you to take action. system.display system.display This lets Claude know the size of your screen so it can accurately click in the right places when automating tasks. This lets Claude know the size of your screen so it can accurately click in the right places when automating tasks. webNavigation webNavigation This lets Claude intervene if it detects that you are on a high-risk website. This lets Claude intervene if it detects that you are on a high-risk website. declarativeNetRequestWithHostAccess declarativeNetRequestWithHostAccess This lets the extension identify itself to Anthropic's servers, helping us understand how the browser extension is being used and troubleshoot any issues. This lets the extension identify itself to Anthropic's servers, helping us understand how the browser extension is being used and troubleshoot any issues. offscreen offscreen This lets Claude play notification sounds in the background when your attention is needed.
